design_plan: Python RNG Execution: seed = hash(title + kind + audience + generated_at) → selected architecture = workflow-command-center. AIDA Check: Attention (cinematic hero), Interest (proof + market context), Desire (workflow + media), Action (CTA band). Font Selection: Cabinet Grotesk (brand-aligned, readable at scale). Hero Math Verification: H1 max-width 1120px, clamp ensures 2–3 lines on desktop. Bento Density Verification: grid-auto-flow: dense present. GSAP Motion Selection: pinned-chapter-scroll + hover-physics with guards. Label Sweep & Button Check: all CTAs high-contrast, black primary, white secondary, correct href verified.
headline: Super for local service businesses handling bookings, quotes, and customer replies

site_brief.audience: local service businesses handling bookings, quotes, and customer replies
site_brief.goal: Create a conversion-focused landing page for this audience. Tie current market evidence to pain points, then show how Super can operate apps and reuse a computer-use cache for repeated work. Include a long-form field guide for this niche with concrete workflows, how-to steps, role-specific examples, objections, and a setup checklist.
queries: local service businesses handling bookings, quotes, and customer replies AI assistant
local service businesses handling bookings, quotes, and customer replies personal AI agent
site_brief.title: Super for local service businesses handling bookings, quotes, and customer replies

summary: A conversion‑focused, editorial landing page showing how Super acts as a personal AI agent for local service businesses — operating real software, reusing a computer-use cache, and reducing friction in bookings, quotes, and customer communication.
